title: ReLife (Retired)
description: Revive dead players in hardcore servers!
body:
This mod is specific to hardcore Minecraft servers. Hardcore is fun because it adds to the intensity of the game. But it's no fun when you're friend dies and you're alone unless you restart. This mod introduces a craftable item that allows you to revive your dead friend in hardcore. To revive your friend right click with the item in hand then type in their display name and press done! It's that easy! This mod is very early in development and things will change and be broken so please be patient. 

NOTICE
The current version of the mod is non functional in multiplayer (literally the mode it's designed for) we believe this is because of how the mod searches for players. We are working on the issue and will update the mod once it is solved. We may also add another secret item in the process but this is still undecided.
